weight_transform: weights passed unmodified as ttnn tensor (ttnn.from_torch); output is dense gradient w.r.t. embedding weight table, same shape as weights ({NUM_EMBEDDINGS}, {EMBEDDING_DIM})
applicability_notes: Computes gradient of embedding lookup w.r.t. the weight table (scatter-add of grad rows by index). Grad tensor must be flattened to (1, 1, batch*seq, embedding_dim) and TILE_LAYOUT. Replaces the torch chain F.embedding -> reshape -> backward -> weights.grad.

placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(grad_data, dtype=output_dtype, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with default (DRAM interleaved) memory config
unit test: weights_ttnn created via ttnn.from_torch with default (DRAM interleaved) memory config
